# Devalok — Full Context

> Devalok is a full-service design and strategy studio headquartered in
> Lucknow, India with US operations in Phoenix, Arizona. We craft brand
> identities, packaging, UI/UX and web experiences, print and event design,
> motion and multimedia, and manage end-to-end production networks for
> thoughtful founders and purpose-driven brands worldwide.

## About

Devalok (देवलोक) — the celestial realm in Hindu philosophy where ideas take
birth, blossom, and mature into completion. This cycle of creation, sustenance,
and transformation is how we work.

Founded 23 August 2024 by Mudit Lal. Headquartered in Lucknow, India with
operations in Phoenix, Arizona. Team of ~14 members called Lokwasis.

### Three Principles

1. **We Craft The Whole** — from brand strategy and identity to packaging,
   digital presence, and manufacturing partnerships. Not fragments, but
   complete brand worlds.

2. **We Do It All In-House** — one multidisciplinary team working as a single
   unit. No silos, no handoffs between disconnected departments.

3. **We Go Beyond the Brief** — when we see potential, we push further. We are
   partners invested in your success, not vendors checking boxes.

---

## Five-Stage Process

Every engagement follows this sequence:

1. **Discovery** — Initial call to understand the business, goals, and needs.
   Usually one hour with the founder. Results in a proposal.

2. **Onboarding & Brand Workshop** — Deep-dive session (1–3 hours) into the
   brand's story, values, audience, and direction. Conducted collaboratively
   using a custom FigJam board. This is the foundation from which all design
   work grows.

3. **Creative Development** — Strategy, design exploration, and iterative
   refinement. The team works across relevant disciplines simultaneously.

4. **Brand Applications** — The identity extends across all touchpoints:
   packaging, web, print, motion, environmental.

5. **Brand Launch** — Coordinated rollout with production support, quality
   assurance, and launch materials.

---

## Services — Six Integrated Disciplines

### 1. Brand Story & Visual Identity

We transform business objectives and market insights into compelling brand
identities that resonate with audiences and differentiate from competitors.

**Sub-capabilities:**

- **Brand Strategy & Positioning** — Market research, competitive analysis,
  target audience profiling, brand purpose and values articulation, positioning
  strategy, messaging framework, brand architecture for multi-brand orgs,
  stakeholder workshops.
  *When you need this:* Launching a new brand or venture. Repositioning an
  existing brand. Entering new markets. Post-merger brand integration.

- **Brand Naming & Verbal Identity** — Name generation and testing, tagline
  development, verbal identity systems (tone, voice, language guidelines),
  domain research, trademark screening, linguistic and cultural testing.
  *When you need this:* Creating a new brand from scratch. Launching new
  products. Rebranding due to merger or strategic shift. Expanding
  internationally.

- **Logo Design & Visual Systems** — Wordmarks, lettermarks, pictorial marks,
  abstract marks, emblems. Color palette definition, typography system,
  iconography, photography and illustration direction, pattern and texture
  development.
  *When you need this:* Building a new brand identity. Modernizing an outdated
  visual identity. Creating consistency across fragmented brand expressions.

- **Brand Guidelines & Standards** — Comprehensive standards documentation,
  logo usage rules, color and typography guidelines, imagery standards, digital
  and social media standards, print specifications, accessibility guidelines,
  brand governance frameworks.
  *When you need this:* After completing a rebrand. Scaling operations with
  multiple teams. Working with external agencies. Onboarding new team members.

**Selected work:** Bondle (baby care — renaming to identity to packaging),
Chandler Sister Cities, Kaizen Waste.

---

### 2. Packaging Design

We transform packaging from a functional necessity into a powerful brand asset
that drives sales and enhances customer experience.

**Sub-capabilities:**

- **Product Packaging Architecture** — Packaging strategy, SKU rationalization,
  visual hierarchy, line extension frameworks, shelf presence and blocking
  strategies.
  *When you need this:* Managing complex product portfolios. Entering retail
  for the first time. Consolidating multiple brands.

- **Structural Package Design** — Custom structural design, material selection,
  die-line development, prototyping, manufacturing feasibility, sustainable
  material alternatives.
  *When you need this:* Developing new product packaging from scratch.
  Differentiating from competitors. Reducing packaging costs. Meeting
  sustainability targets.

- **Label & Graphics Design** — Primary and secondary panel design, information
  hierarchy, product photography direction, regulatory compliance (FDA, USDA,
  EPA), multi-lingual design, retail environment visualization.
  *When you need this:* Launching new products or flavors. Meeting regulatory
  requirements. Expanding into new geographic markets.

- **Sustainable Packaging Solutions** — Recyclable and compostable design,
  source reduction, reusable packaging systems, circular economy strategies,
  life cycle assessment, plastic alternative identification.
  *When you need this:* Meeting corporate sustainability commitments. Responding
  to consumer demand for eco-friendly packaging. Complying with EPR regulations.

**Selected work:** Eat Purposefully (granola — concept to shelf), Bondle,
DIVINI.

---

### 3. UI/UX and Web Design

We create seamless, engaging digital experiences that put users first while
advancing business objectives.

**Sub-capabilities:**

- **User Experience Research & Strategy** — User research (interviews, surveys,
  contextual inquiry), usability testing, journey mapping, information
  architecture, persona creation, analytics review, accessibility audits,
  conversion optimization.
  *When you need this:* Planning a website or app redesign. Poor conversion
  rates. Launching a new digital product. High bounce rates.

- **User Interface Design** — Visual design, design system creation, component
  library development, responsive design, interactive prototyping,
  micro-interactions, WCAG accessibility compliance.
  *When you need this:* Creating a new website or application. Modernizing an
  outdated interface. Building a scalable design system.

- **Website Design & Development** — Custom website design, CMS implementation,
  front-end and back-end development, e-commerce platforms, SEO optimization,
  performance optimization, third-party integrations.
  *When you need this:* Building a new website. Redesigning an underperforming
  site. Launching e-commerce. Migrating platforms.

- **Mobile App Design** — iOS and Android native apps, progressive web apps,
  mobile-first design, onboarding flows, push notification strategy, app store
  optimization.
  *When you need this:* Launching a mobile-first product. Extending brand to
  mobile. Creating companion apps.

- **Prototyping & Testing** — Low and high-fidelity prototypes, A/B testing,
  usability testing, remote testing, analytics and heat mapping, stakeholder
  validation.
  *When you need this:* De-risking major design decisions. Testing new features
  before development. Optimizing conversion funnels.

**Selected work:** Arculis Advisors (M&A advisory — brand + website),
MoveCars.com (28-year-old domain rebrand + platform).

---

### 4. Print & Event Design

We transform brand stories into physical experiences that captivate, inform,
and inspire.

**Sub-capabilities:**

- **Editorial & Publication Design** — Magazine and journal design, book
  design, annual reports, white papers, catalogs, infographics, print
  production management.
  *When you need this:* Publishing magazines, journals, or books. Creating
  annual reports. Developing thought leadership content.

- **Marketing Collateral Design** — Brochures, sales presentations, business
  cards, signage, posters, direct mail, point-of-sale materials, trade show
  graphics.
  *When you need this:* Supporting sales teams. Launching marketing campaigns.
  Attending trade shows. Opening new locations.

- **Event Branding & Environmental Design** — Event brand identity and theme,
  environmental graphics, stage and set design, signage and wayfinding, booth
  design, digital display content, swag design, event collateral.
  *When you need this:* Hosting branded events or conferences. Creating pop-up
  experiences. Launching products at events.

- **Exhibition & Trade Show Design** — Trade show booths, modular display
  systems, museum and gallery exhibitions, interactive displays, lighting and
  AV integration, logistics and setup planning.
  *When you need this:* Exhibiting at industry trade shows. Creating traveling
  exhibitions. Designing museum installations.

**Selected work:** NEETI launch event (stationery, gifts, stage graphics, AV
assets, on-ground details).

---

### 5. Motion & Multimedia

We create video, animation, and multimedia content that cuts through the noise
and connects with audiences across every digital platform.

**Sub-capabilities:**

- **Brand Animation & Motion Graphics** — Logo animation, explainer videos, 2D
  and 3D motion graphics, infographic animation, motion design systems, UI
  animation for websites and apps, motion brand guidelines.
  *When you need this:* Animating your brand identity. Creating explainer
  videos for complex products. Developing social media content. Adding motion
  to digital experiences.

- **Video Production & Editing** — Video strategy, scriptwriting and
  storyboarding, live-action production, cinematography, editing and post-
  production, color grading, sound design, voiceover, multi-platform
  optimization.
  *When you need this:* Creating brand films. Producing product demos.
  Capturing testimonials. Documenting events.

- **Social Media Content Creation** — Short-form video (Reels, TikTok,
  Stories), animated posts, GIFs and cinemagraphs, social media video ads,
  content calendars, trend analysis.
  *When you need this:* Building consistent social media presence. Running
  social campaigns. Increasing engagement.

- **Interactive Multimedia Experiences** — Interactive infographics, web-based
  interactive experiences, HTML5 animations, AR/VR experiences, 360-degree
  video, gamification, touchscreen and kiosk experiences.
  *When you need this:* Creating engaging educational content. Developing
  interactive product experiences. Building immersive brand storytelling.

**Case study:** 9-minute animated explainer for ASU on lunar bases — 7.2K+
views in 8 months, second most viewed video on the channel.

---

### 6. Production Network

We bridge the gap between design and delivery, ensuring brand operations run
smoothly and scale successfully.

**Sub-capabilities:**

- **Supply Chain Strategy & Setup** — End-to-end supply chain design, make vs.
  buy analysis, domestic vs. international sourcing, supplier diversification,
  inventory management, demand forecasting, risk assessment, cost modeling,
  sustainability integration.
  *When you need this:* Launching a new product line. Scaling operations.
  Reducing supply chain costs. Building resilience.

- **Manufacturing Partner Sourcing** — Manufacturer identification and
  research, RFQ management, facility audits, capability and capacity
  evaluation, compliance verification, contract negotiation, sample
  coordination, performance monitoring.
  *When you need this:* Finding manufacturers for new products. Diversifying
  your manufacturing base. Replacing underperforming suppliers. Expanding to
  new regions.

- **Quality Assurance & Control Systems** — QMS design, inspection and testing
  protocols, supplier quality requirements, CAPA systems, statistical process
  control, compliance and regulatory support, continuous improvement frameworks.
  *When you need this:* Experiencing quality issues. Establishing standards for
  new products. Meeting regulatory or certification requirements.

- **Logistics & Distribution Planning** — Distribution network design, 3PL
  selection and management, fulfillment strategy, last-mile optimization,
  inventory positioning, import/export compliance.
  *When you need this:* Setting up distribution for new products. Optimizing
  delivery times and costs. Expanding to new markets.

**Production partners:**
| ASU Print and Imaging Lab | Print | Phoenix, Arizona |
| MOO | Premium print | Rhode Island, USA |
| Bajaj Copiers & Printers | Print | Lucknow, India |
| WLBS | Website/product development | India |
| Dpotli | Handcrafted products, packaging | Rajasthan, India |
| Maev Overseas | Garment production | Uttar Pradesh, India |

---

## Notable Clients

MoveCars.com, Arculis Advisors, Eat Purposefully, Bondle, Kaizen Waste,
Chandler Sister Cities, DIVINI, NEETI, Coffee Plantation, Infinity Mind
Movies. 25+ clients served, 20+ from the US.

- Creative Gaga — Designed the cover; article "Price the Soul of your work"

  (Model Context Protocol) integration, 54 tools registered
- **Shilp Sutra** (@devalok/shilp-sutra on npm) — Design system
